text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho and I decide to eat lunch off
campus, so we head to a diner.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Whew! I am full! I think I might've eaten too much.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, the food here is pretty good. I wonder
what I should try next...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is this? Some kind of magic crystal?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The kids' meal comes with a pendant that has a
magic crystal!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! How could you miss this, Familiar? I would
have gotten that if I knew!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph... I don't care if I'm full! I'm getting this too!
choice_data_list: Do what you gotta do to become a great witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Your master is saying she wants a magical
pendant, so order the kids' meal! Order it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I express my concern for her health if she
overeats... but she completely ignores me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
When I say I want it, that means I want it! I'm not
leaving until I get it!
choice_data_list: Hey, what if I eat it for you?
Hey, what if I eat it for you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I guess that could work! Excuuuse me! One kids'
meal for my friend here, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wish she hadn't been so loud about it, but seeing
Sweep Tosho so satisfied with her toy gives me a
sense of a job well done.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, of course! That magic crystal is as good as
mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's clearly in pain from eating so
much, Sweep Tosho finishes every last bite and
gets the toy pendant!
